name: Purify Food and Drink
description: All nonmagical food and drink within a 5-foot-radius sphere centered on a point of your choice within range is purified and rendered free of poison and disease.
effect: All nonmagical food and drink within a 5-foot sphere at a point within range is cleansed of all poisons and diseases. The effect is permanent and instantaneous.
notes: Can be cast as a ritual (add 10 minutes to casting time) — saves the mana cost.
Affects all food and drink in a 5-ft sphere at a chosen point within 10 ft (range 2 grid cells).
No effect on magical poisons or cursed food.
